description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named validate-p4c that runs daily at midnight UTC, on push to main, and on pull requests to main. Run a validation job in parallel with normal tests on ubuntu-20.04 if the workflow is triggered on a schedule or if the pull request has a 'run-validation' label. The job checks out the repository with submodules, uses ccache, builds with a script, and runs validation tests with ctest.
